svg.text: Re-engages: pause drip, owner gets 7-day window. Qualify or drip resumes.
Re-submitted: new source → full Day 0 restart as brand-new lead.
Qualified leads: AM works directly, no automated workflow.
Calls assigned to LM (cold email/SMS/call) or AM (direct mail/VAPI/referral/website).
